title: pseudoroegneria cognata
intro: Pseudoroegneria cognata, also known as Tibetan wheat grass or Tibetan timothy grass, is a species of grass that is native to the Tibetan Plateau. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pseudoroegneria cognata include its ability to improve digestion, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Pseudoroegneria cognata is often prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or dried extract for consumption, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
